description: This file contains SCSS mixins and functions for implementing Responsive Font Sizes (RFS), enabling scalable and responsive design elements such as font sizes, paddings, and margins based on viewport dimensions.

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Performs division of two numbers with specified precision, considering units and sign.

methods.name: rfs-value
methods.description: Generates CSS value strings for responsive sizing based on input list of values.

methods.name: rfs-fluid-value
methods.description: Calculates fluid responsive CSS values with media query adjustments based on input list.
